Video.summary: Andy Griffith & Barbara McNair star. Featuring a coach who brings work home, & a number about Smokey The Bear.
Video.title: Andy Griffith, Barbara Mcnair

Video.summary: Dick Van Dyke is Carol's guest, lending his impressive talents to an homage to Shirley Temple films.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Dick Van Dyke

Video.summary: Kaye Ballard and Tim Conway appear on the game show spoof "The Dater's Game".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Tim Conway, Kay Ballard

Video.summary: Dick Martin is the town gigolo on "As The Stomach Turns." Also: a spoof of "Sunset Boulevard."
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Dick Martin

Video.summary: Maggie Smith returns to guest star as the erudite teacher of Eunice and Ed's son Bubba in "The Family."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Maggie Smith

Video.summary: Carol's guests tonight are Garry Moore and Durward Kirby.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Garry Moore, Durward Kirby

Video.summary: Don Adams plays a talk show host beset with technical difficulties and Carol's agitated husband.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Lesley Ann Warren, Don Adams

Video.summary: Guest Jack Weston matches with Carol on a computer date, Carol sings, and Harvey plays Dr. Jekyll.
Video.title: Jack Weston

Video.summary: Art Carney & Pat Carroll guest. Art plays an exterminator, then he & Pat appear on "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Pat Carroll, Art Carney

Video.summary: Sid Caesar guests in the WWII spoof "Mrs. Magnificent." On "Carol & Sis", Roger gets dragged into a PTA show.
Video.title: Sid Caesar

Video.summary: Tim Conway and Steve Lawrence guest star!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, and David Frost join Carol for an Italian-style production of Cinderella.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost

Image.alt: Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost

Video.summary: As The Oldest Conductor, Tim Conway leads the Sydney Orchestra.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Tim Conway, Ed Villella, Lucette Aldous

Image.alt: Tim Conway, Ed Villella, Lucette Aldous
Tim Conway, Ed Villella, Lucette Aldous
Tim Conway, Ed Villella, Lucette Aldous
Tim Conway, Ed Villella, Lucette Aldous
Tim Conway, Ed Villella, Lucette Aldous
Tim Conway, Ed Villella, Lucette Aldous
Tim Conway, Ed Villella, Lucette Aldous
Tim Conway, Ed Villella, Lucette Aldous

Video.summary: Ken Berry stars, spoofing "Love In An Avalanche," which makes way for a more tropically based number.
Video.title: Ken Berry

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence and Carol Channing join Carol, Harvey, Vicki, and Lyle for a tribute to the Academy Awards.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Carol Channing, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence is your MC for a roast of Nora Desmond. In "Carol & Sis", Vicki helps sober up a tipsy Carol.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Dick Van Dyke & Tony Randall star! Includes Dick as a salesman, and Carol & Tony as marrieds.
Video.title: Dick Van Dyke, Tony Randall

Video.summary: Jonathan Winters guests and is interviewed by Harvey. In "Carol & Sis", Carol and Harvey struggle with names.
Video.title: Jonathan Winters

Video.summary: Guest Robert Goulet joins Q&A. Sketches include the aftermath of a party, and a maid entranced by a star.
Video.title: Robert Goulet

Video.summary: Guests Mama Cass Elliot and Ken Berry offer up some musical numbers and a series of commercial parodies.
Video.title: Ken Berry, Cass Elliot

Video.summary: Guests Ronnie Schell and Vicki Carr take to the stage with stand-up and song (respectively)!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Ronnie Schell, Vikki Carr

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence plays an unsuccessful comic. Also: commercial spoofs; Tim at war, attempting to fire a cannon.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Guest Ken Berry is back to sing and dance his way into your heart.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Ken Berry

Video.summary: Bob Newhart appears in "Carol & Sis" as Roger's accountant. Also: a hungover Harvey gets a bigger headache.
Video.title: Bob Newhart

Video.summary: Ken Berry and Natalie Cole are tonight's guests!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Natalie Cole, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Poetically-named guest stars Martha Raye and Tim Conway come to play.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Martha Raye, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Sketches include Carol as an old lady feeding birds, Tim as a wacky pharmacist, and Carol & Vicki on a cruise.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Frank Gorshin and Lana Turner guest. Gorshin does impressions, then joins Turner in a sketch about Bluebeard.
Video.title: Frank Gorshin, Lana Turner

Video.summary: Dyan Cannon & Paul Lynde star. Lynde plays an insurance salesman, and Cannon is on "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Dyan Cannon, Paul Lynde

Video.summary: Ken Berry and Nanette Fabray star. Featuring Carol as a dowdy secretary, and the spoof "Flight 13 To Nowhere."
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Bing Crosby & Paul Lynde appear in "As The Stomach Turns." On "The Old Folks", Lynde joins the elderly duo.
Video.title: Bing Crosby, Paul Lynde

Video.summary: George Chakiris and Shirley Jones guest. Chakiris joins for Q&A, while Jones is a secretary in "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Shirley Jones, George Chakiris

Video.summary: Tonight's episode features Ruth Buzzi & Richard Crenna, who appear in a salute to "bad girls" of cinema.
Video.title: Ruth Buzzi, Richard Crenna

Video.summary: Martha Raye and Betty Grable guest in "As The Stomach Turns." Q&A and a contest reveals stiff completion.
Video.title: Martha Raye, Betty Grable

Video.summary: Guests Ken Berry and Totie Fields drop by to take part in "Carol & Sis" and "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Ken Berry, Totie Fields

Video.summary: Guests Robert Goulet and Imogene Coca appear in a fairy tale musical--the story of Cinderrumplewhite.
Video.title: Imogene Coca, Robert Goulet
